promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active runtime authority, as proof that v2 is a self-sufficient run capsule, or as permission to promote patch README claims, restored sequence state, stable hashes, or carried packet residue into active A2 law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the v1 progress-bundle child is now complete and explicitly hands off next descent to the v2 sibling revision.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates the needed bounded seam: a patched continuation export with README repair semantics, a two-step embedded snapshot, restored sequence maxima, clean continuation claims that sit over dirty retained state, carried strategy packets beyond embedded event proof, and strong hash/transport residue with missing evidence bodies and control context.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The v1 progress-bundle child was used to preserve the sibling-revision comparison seam, the parent-run child was used to keep v2 below full-run archive demotion and failure-texture rules, and the migrated-run-root child was used to preserve the larger archive handoff chain instead of letting the patch README overpromote this export.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the v2 export needs its own A2-mid child before the archive can move cleanly into the broader bundle sibling.
Deferred because that parent already has a completed A2-mid child and now serves as sibling comparison support rather than the current primary target.
Deferred because the full parent run already has a completed A2-mid child and now serves as upstream comparison support only.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent first-pass source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summary already isolate the least noisy packets: patched continuation export status, clean continuation versus dirty retained state, README packet claim versus event proof, restored sequence resume control, stable hash and transport residue, missing evidence bodies, and the explicit next-step handoff to RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001_bundle.

candidate_items.name: PROGRESS_BUNDLE_V2_IS_PATCHED_CONTINUATION_EXPORT_NOT_SELF_SUFFICIENT_RUN_CAPSULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves v2 as a historical patch/export object rather than as a current self-sufficient run capsule.

candidate_items.name: CLEAN_CONTINUATION_LANGUAGE_AND_DIRTY_RETAINED_STATE_MUST_BOTH_SURVIVE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's central contradiction that README, summary, and soak surfaces present a clean continuation while the stored state still retains parks, rejects, and kill signals.

candidate_items.name: README_000010_PLUS_000011_CLAIM_OUTRUNS_EMBEDDED_EVENT_LEDGER_PROOF
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the gap between the README's latest clean continuation claim on packets 000010 and 000011 and the embedded event ledger that references strategy packets only through 000009.

candidate_items.name: RESTORED_SEQUENCE_LEDGER_AND_RUN_LOCAL_RESUME_CONTROL_ARE_REAL_PARTIAL_REPAIR_NOT_FULL_CONTEXT_CLOSURE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the meaningful repair value of run-local state and restored sequence maxima while keeping explicit that broader control surfaces and sim evidence remain absent.

candidate_items.name: HASH_AND_TRANSPORT_RESIDUE_SURVIVE_MORE_CLEANLY_THAN_EVIDENCE_BODIES_OR_FULL_CONTROL_CONTEXT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the stable end-state hash, sequence maxima, packet counts, and carried strategies as stronger retained residues than the missing sim evidence bodies and omitted heavier control context.

candidate_items.name: NEXT_DESCENT_SHOULD_PROCESS_RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001_BUNDLE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's explicit next-step rule that the next bounded sibling after v2 is RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001_bundle.

quarantined_items.name: PATCHED_V2_EXPORT_AS_ACTIVE_POLICY_OR_RUNTIME_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is a historical patch/export object, not a live control surface.

quarantined_items.name: CLEAN_CONTINUATION_CLAIM_AS_FULL_STATE_CLEANLINESS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The stored end state still preserves park, reject, and kill residue beneath the clean continuation language.

quarantined_items.name: README_PACKET_CLAIM_AS_FULLY_PROVED_BY_EMBEDDED_EVENT_LEDGER
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The embedded event ledger stops its strategy references at 000009 even though packets 000010 and 000011 are carried and named in the README.

quarantined_items.name: HASH_STABILITY_AS_FULL_EVIDENCE_CLOSURE_OR_CONTEXT_CERTAINTY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Stable hash agreement does not restore missing evidence bodies or omitted higher-control context.

quarantined_items.name: RESTORED_SEQUENCE_STATE_AND_RUN_LOCAL_RESUME_AS_SELF_SUFFICIENT_RUN_CAPSULE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The repair is real but partial; broader run-control surfaces and sim evidence remain absent.

quarantined_items.name: PATCH_LANGUAGE_AS_PROOF_THE_REPLAY_FAMILY_IS_NOW_FULLY_HARDENED
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The bundle hardens resume semantics in specific ways without becoming a complete, self-sufficient replay authority.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the least noisy reusable packets in the parent: patched continuation export demotion, clean continuation versus dirty retained state, README packet claims outrunning event proof, partial resume repair, strong hash and transport residue over missing evidence/context, and the handoff into the next bundle sibling.
They remain archive-linked, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active runtime, replay-family hardening, and clean-state authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain patch-language overread, clean-state overread, event-proof overread, hash-as-full-closure overread, self-sufficient-capsule overread, or replay-hardening overread rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
